text.title: BA Knowledge Areas Detail Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the knowledge-areas-detail methodology end-to-end.

step.name: plan-deliverables
step.action: Per-KA deliverable list with owner + due.

step.name: execute-with-handoffs
step.action: Run each KA with explicit handoff to next; loop back if validation fails.

step.name: audit-map
step.action: Map deliverables to evidence rows for compliance / audit.
step.decision-gate: Validate against the output contract before declaring done; if invalid, loop back to the failing step.
